title: Grid telemetry fingerprint
abstract: Methods, Systems, and Computer program products can use grid telemetry to generate a fingerprint. One of these methods includes generating a first grid telemetry fingerprint based on characteristics of an electrical grid. The method also includes verifying a transaction based on the first grid telemetry fingerprint and a second grid telemetry fingerprint associated with the transaction.
claims: 1. A method comprising: generating a grid telemetry fingerprint based on characteristics of an electrical grid at a grid connection point; generating a device telemetry fingerprint based on electrical characteristics of a computing device connected to the electrical grid at the grid connection point; determining physical presence of the computing device at the grid connection point by correlating the device telemetry fingerprint with the grid telemetry fingerprint; and restricting operations of a digital system executing on the computing device based on the determined physical presence.
